{
  "claim_texts": [
    "SB 10 would create opioid prevention and education programs in California schools.",
    "SB 10 aims to provide school staff, students, and their families with information about the growing risk of opioids.",
    "SB 10 is designed to equip educators and other school staff with the knowledge and tools to save a child who overdoses on campus.",
    "The bipartisan bill SB 10 is supported by California’s teachers and other school and law enforcement groups.",
    "The bill aligns with the Governor’s budget proposal to ensure every middle and high school can access and afford the opioid antagonist Naloxone."
  ]
